nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander de Stourton 2 Children was born in 1205, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Michael de Stourton, was 21 and his mother, Mary Malville de Mauduit, was 16. He married Annabella Silvester. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1245, in Wirral, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander de Stourton 2 Children est né en 1205, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Michael de Stourton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mary Malville de Mauduit, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Annabella Silvester. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1245, à Wirral, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander de Stourton 2 Children 1205 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Michael de Stourton 21 und seine Mutter Mary Malville de Mauduit 16. Er hat Annabella Silvester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1245 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Wirral, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Stourton 2 Children è nato il nel 1205 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Michael de Stourton, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mary Malville de Mauduit, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Annabella Silvester. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1245, nel Wirral, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander de Stourton 2 Children(이)가 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Michael de Stourton(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Malville de Mauduit(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Annabella Silvester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 위럴에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander de Stourton 2 Children родился в 1205 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Michael de Stourton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Malville de Mauduit, 16.
